Comfortable Amenities: The property features air-conditioning, private bathrooms with walk-in showers, and family rooms. Additional amenities include a coffee shop, outdoor play area, and barbecue facilities.
Dining Experience: A buffet breakfast is served daily, and room service is available. The on-site restaurant offers a child-friendly buffet and outdoor seating.
